channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Fighting Game April Jam 2026 Hosted by der Mondhase , gamersgoinblind , Mr.MKL , Syrkle , DoctorButler , PXN. , mattrified , vankil Â· #FightingGameAprilJam2026 145 Joined Overview Community 8 Submissions open from 2026-03-31 19:00:00 to 2026-05-02 21:59:59 Starts in years months
